name: Editor hunk workflow
summary: Workspace hunk review state is now derived by the Rust runtime from durable workspace change records and current file content. The runtime can tell clients whether a hunk is acceptable, rejectable, rollbackable, or stale without changing the persisted WorkspaceChangeRecord encoding.

tests.command: cargo test -p ioi-node --features local-mode --bin ioi-runtime-bridge inspect -- --nocapture

remainingProof: live GUI hunk proposal, accept, reject, rollback, and stale mutation screenshot sequence
headless fixture that inspects a thread with workspace_change_reviews populated from persisted trajectory state
cross-client proof that GUI/CLI/TUI consume the same bridge review state
